title: Signature Error
description: Closed pack-signature error vocabulary. Per `docs/architecture/crypto-rules.md`, every signature-comparison failure collapses to `INVALID_SIGNATURE`; the explicit `SIGNATURE_DISABLED` code is reserved for the documented "feature off" state. The structure carries no key id, no attempted value, and no algorithm name on the wire. See `docs/architecture/error-schema-map.md` for the layer / consumer / owning-plan map across all error-shaped schemas.

code.description: Closed enum. `INVALID_SIGNATURE` covers wrong key, no such key, malformed signature, and any other failure mode; consumers MUST NOT branch on a richer reason.

errorId.description: UUID v4 minted by `formatUserError` / `formatDevError`. Cross-referenced from on-device crash log.
